title: Volunteer Application
prompt: Write a short letter or email to apply for a part-time volunteer position in an organization that helps children.
requirements: State why you want to apply.
Explain why you are suitable for the position.

title: Housewarming Invitation
prompt: Write a short letter or email to introduce yourself to your new neighbor and invite them to your housewarming party.
requirements: Give the party time and basic plan.
